title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at PayU

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at PayU
jsonLd.description:
We at PayU are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About PayU:
PayU is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PayU!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
